allow: Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu-20.04 -- bash -lc "cd /home/doobie-droid/portfolio && \(yarn build 2>&1 || npx nuxt build 2>&1\) | tail -150")

Bash(cd "//wsl.localhost/ubuntu-20.04/home/doobie-droid/portfolio" && cat node_modules/tailwindcss/package.json | grep '"version"'; grep -n "perspective" .output/public/_nuxt/projects.BHCC4_zp.css; echo "---file---"; cat .output/public/_nuxt/projects.BHCC4_zp.css)

Bash(cd "//wsl.localhost/ubuntu-20.04/home/doobie-droid/portfolio" && grep -o '\\.\\\\?\\[perspective[^}]*}' .output/server/chunks/build/entry-styles.gwmBJwiU.mjs | head -5; echo "---broader---"; grep -o '[^"]*perspective[^"]*' .output/server/chunks/build/entry-styles.gwmBJwiU.mjs | head -5)
